description: Focused on attachment/attachment programmes common in Zambian universities. Emphasises academic integration and skill transfer.

examples.title: Attachment Application at Barclays Bank Zambia
examples.body:
4 April 2026

Dear Recruitment Manager,

I am writing to apply for the student attachment programme at Barclays Bank Zambia. I am a third-year student at the University of Zambia pursuing a Bachelor of Business Administration with a major in Banking and Finance, and I am eager to gain practical banking experience.

My academic programme has covered financial management, credit analysis, investment principles, and banking operations. I have achieved a cumulative GPA of 3.6 and have been on the Dean's List for two consecutive semesters. My coursework in risk management and financial reporting has given me a solid theoretical foundation that I am eager to apply in a real banking environment.

I am particularly interested in retail banking and customer relationship management. I believe that understanding customer needs and delivering excellent service is the foundation of successful banking. During a group project on customer satisfaction in the banking sector, I conducted surveys and analysed data that revealed the importance of personalised service in customer retention.

I am a quick learner, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with numbers and financial data. I am proficient in Microsoft Excel, including pivot tables and financial functions, and I have basic knowledge of banking software from a short course I completed online.

I am available for a six-month attachment from June to November 2026. I am committed to making the most of this opportunity and contributing positively to your team.

Yours sincerely,

Dorothy Banda

examples.title: Attachment at Ministry of Lands and Natural Resources
examples.body:
20 January 2026

Dear Permanent Secretary,

I am writing to request an attachment position in the Lands Department at the Ministry of Lands and Natural Resources. I am a final-year student at the University of Zambia studying Land Administration and Management, and I am seeking practical experience in land governance and administration.

My academic training has covered land law, cadastral surveying, land registration systems, land use planning, and geographic information systems. I have completed coursework in the Lands Act, the Customary Land Administration Regulations, and land valuation principles. I am proficient in ArcGIS and have basic skills in remote sensing using QGIS.

I am particularly interested in the ministry's ongoing land titling programmes and the integration of customary land records into the formal system. My dissertation focuses on the challenges of land registration in peri-urban areas, and I believe that practical experience at the ministry would provide invaluable context for my research.

I am a disciplined, responsible student who respects authority and follows procedures. I understand that government work requires patience, attention to detail, and adherence to established protocols. I am prepared to assist in any capacity, from file management to fieldwork and data entry.

I am available for a six-month attachment starting in February 2026. I would be deeply grateful for the opportunity to serve and learn under your ministry's guidance.

Yours faithfully,

Elias Mulenga

examples.title: Attachment at University Teaching Hospital
examples.body:
10 June 2026

Dear Human Resources Director,

I am applying for the clinical attachment position in the Medical Records Department at the University Teaching Hospital. I am a third-year student at Evelyn Hone College studying Health Records and Information Management, and I am eager to gain hands-on experience in a major hospital setting.

My programme has provided training in medical terminology, health information systems, medical coding, patient record management, and healthcare data analysis. I have completed modules in ICD-10 coding, health statistics, and the Zambian health information system framework. I am proficient in Microsoft Office and have introductory training in the DHIS2 health information platform.

I am particularly interested in how accurate record-keeping supports clinical decision-making, quality improvement, and health system planning. During a hospital observation visit in my second year, I witnessed how a well-maintained patient record system enabled doctors to track treatment progress and identify complications early. That experience reinforced my commitment to excellence in health information management.

I am a meticulous, organised person who understands that in healthcare, accuracy is not optional, it is essential. I am prepared to work long hours, follow strict confidentiality protocols, and learn from experienced health records officers.

I am available for a six-month attachment from July to December 2026. I would be honoured to serve at your esteemed institution.

Yours faithfully,

Maureen Chansa
